title: masdevallia rolandorum
intro: Masdevallia rolandorum, also known as the Roland's Masdevallia, is a species of orchid native to Peru. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues and reduce inflammation. Traditionally, Masdevallia rolandorum has been used to relieve coughs and colds, as well as to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, with herbal preparations typically involving the use of the leaves and stems, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
